response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software development experience and strong technical breadth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with notable depth in testing tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium courses). However, the role requires formal people management (2+ years) and developer-tools/build-systems experience at scale, plus mobile-platform ecosystem knowledge — none of which are clearly demonstrated. Resume shows individual contributor trajectory (Staff/Senior IC) with no evidence of managing engineers, setting team priorities, or conducting performance reviews.
strengths: 13+ years software development experience, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Strong testing/dev-tools background: built test runners, assertion libraries, ran TDD/Selenium workshops
Polyglot technical breadth (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Java, Swift) suitable for tooling work
concerns: No demonstrated people management or team leadership experience (2-year minimum unmet)
No mobile platform ecosystem experience at scale (brief iOS/Apple TV work is dated, 2015-2016)
No experience with large-scale build systems, compilers, or automated release infrastructure for a major platform

key_factors.factor: Strong testing and developer tooling background
